mapper.sql: id, user_id, user_name, user_type, target_id, target_type, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (id, user_id, user_name, user_type, target_id, target_type, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userType}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM likes WHERE target_id = #{targetId} AND target_type = #{targetType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_type = #{userType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
